textByHash.2f346b3394ec3546ec8e7ff9e1daaf9f3be165c9: Purrrrr! So you can talk to cats now?
textByHash.3d6ed7d6faa2cc0538df3f5daeb3835882f6d89a: Oh yes, it's a great place for catching a bit of tail.
textByHash.5af08eb07d19de221a8a4dc2fa12b1c6b305bf5e: Well, I should thank you for finding my kitten that time. I have a terrible time keeping track of them, and I never know how many Gertrude has managed to sell.
textByHash.93ff7bf9d4653d9a65140c2762fc6c8c534ffd6b: Good, good. That's what I like to hear.
textByHash.a0fd6272f911b7b497e1432be7da42bf0665b2c6: My children have always been popular with adventurers. They inherit their father's adventurous spirit. He's always travelling the world, when he can find some kind person to help him open doors!
textByHash.e4602b166dfff13871e733502e45ff954022adeb: Oh would you ever quit worrying, I come down here to watch the fights all the time.
